home_page__hero_description: An opinionated Vite Plus (Vite+) monorepo featuring TanStack Start, Dockerized deployments, Paraglide.js (i18n), Hono, oRPC, drizzle-orm, better-auth, and more.
home_page__integrations__description: TanStack Start works with most major cloud providers and JavaScript runtimes thanks to the Nitro Vite plugin and our Docker templates.
home_page__cta_description: Read our documentation to get started with tsu-stack or check out our GitHub repository.
error_404__description_line_1: The page you're looking for might have been
error_500__description_line_2: Please try refreshing the page, or go back home.
auth__terms_agreement: By clicking continue, you agree to our
auth__password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth__name_min_length: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth__root_create_account_description: Use the single bootstrap email configured for this installation. Staff accounts are created from invitation links only.
auth__root_verification_required: Check your email to verify your account before signing in.
school_setup_page__description: Create the academic years, academic terms, grade levels, subjects, and sections needed before student admissions and attendance.
school_setup_page__unavailable_descripti: Select an active organization or ask an owner or principal to grant setup access.
school_setup_page__quick_create_descript: Add setup records in dependency order: academic year, academic term, grade level, subject, then section.
school_setup_page__academic_years_empty_: Create the current year before opening sections.
school_setup_page__academic_terms_empty_: Create terms inside each academic year for timetable and attendance reporting.
school_setup_page__academic_term_depende: Create an academic year before adding terms.
school_setup_page__set_as_current_year_d: Marks this as the active year and removes the flag from any other year.
school_setup_page__grade_levels_empty_de: Add grades in their natural display order.
school_setup_page__subjects_empty_descri: Add core subjects before timetable planning.
school_setup_page__sections_empty_descri: Create sections once an academic year and grade exist.
school_setup_page__section_dependencies_: Create at least one academic year and one grade level before adding sections.
school_setup_page__read_only_description: You can view setup records, but only owners and principals can manage them.
school_bootstrap_page__description: Create the school record used for setup, staff access, and future school operations.
school_bootstrap_page__multiple_schools_: You can create more than one school and switch between them later.
school_bootstrap_page__school_name_descr: Use the official name staff will recognize.
school_bootstrap_page__school_slug_descr: Optional. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
school_bootstrap_page__duplicate_slug: A school with this slug already exists. Choose a different slug.
school_bootstrap_page__existing_schools_: Switch between schools you can access.
school_bootstrap_page__unavailable_descr: Refresh the page or sign in again before creating a school.
auth__accept_invitation_description: Join {school} with the email address on this invitation.
auth__invitation_email_locked: This email is locked to the invitation.
auth__invitation_required_description: Accounts are created by school invitation only. Ask your School Admin for an invitation.
auth__invitation_unavailable: This invitation is unavailable or expired.
auth__sign_in_invitation_required_help: Sign in with the email address your school invited. New accounts are created from invitation links only.
auth__verification_required: Check your email to verify your account before accepting the invitation.
invitations_page__empty: No pending invitations for your email address.
staff_invitations__accept_description: Join {schoolName} with the email address on this invitation.
staff_invitations__description: Review school invitations sent to your email address.
staff_invitations__empty: No pending invitations for your email address.
staff_invitations__list_unavailable_desc: Refresh the page or sign in again before accepting invitations.
staff_invitations__locked_email_descript: This email is locked to the invitation.
staff_invitations__not_pending_descripti: This invitation is {status} and cannot be accepted.
staff_invitations__unavailable_descripti: Refresh the page or ask your School Admin for a new invitation.
staff_invitations__verification_required: Check your email to verify your account before accepting the invitation.
staff_page__access_already_linked: This staff member already has app access.
staff_page__description: Manage staff records and invitation-based app access for the active school.
staff_page__directory_description: Update staff details and manage app access from each record.
staff_page__duplicate_staff_record: A staff member with this email or employee code already exists.
staff_page__email_required: Staff members need an email address.
staff_page__new_staff_description: Create the staff record first, then send app access when ready.
staff_page__principal_management_denied: Only root School Admins can grant principal access.
staff_page__read_only_description: You can view staff, but only owners and principals can manage staff records and access.
staff_page__roles_description: Choose the school access role for this staff member.
staff_page__save_failed: Staff record could not be saved.
staff_page__staff_management_denied: Only owners and principals can manage staff.
staff_page__unavailable_description: Refresh the page or select a school before managing staff.
